name: Shrimporee Creole
recipeInstructions:
1. Cook the shrimp.
2. Remove shells from the shrimp.
3. To make creole sauce, sauté onion, green pepper, garlic, and celery in butter or margarine until they are limp.
4. Add flour to the mixture and cook, stirring constantly, until the flour turns light tan.
5. Gradually add all other ingredients except parsley and rice to the saucepan.
6. Cook the sauce until it thickens.
7. Taste and adjust seasoning with salt and pepper as needed.
8. Stir in minced parsley.
9. Serve the shrimporee over hot, freshly cooked rice. Serves 4.
